commands.review_summary:
The PR routes Discord gateway metadata REST fetches through the validated Discord proxy using guarded explicit-proxy fetch mode and updates the proxy regression test.

Reproducibility: yes. there is a high-confidence source-level reproduction: current main keeps gateway metadata fetchImpl on the direct guarded path after proxy validation while only the WebSocket agent is proxied. I did not establish a live Discord/proxy runtime reproduction in this read-only review.
